title: 2020 stand-alone dental plan (SADP) data
meta-description: Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The data below includes 2020 stand-alone dental plans available in a given area.
excerpt: Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The data below includes 2020 stand-alone dental plans available in a given area.
content:
Dental coverage is offered as part of some health plans, but not all of them. The data below includes 2020 stand-alone dental plans available in a given area.

For 2019 dental plan data, visit this page.

Note: The data below will be most useful to developers, professionals, researchers, and others who want to study, analyze, and download the complete dataset of 2020 plan and price information. For all others, please use our more user-friendly tool for previewing 2020 plans and prices.

See all available 2020 health plans.

View instructions or download (ZIP file).

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
